variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list missed several clear SG&A component rows visible in the income statement preview. Per rules, used exact A-column component labels instead of subtotal 'Operating expenses'. Excluded totals/subtotals and excluded depreciation/amortization/finance/tax lines. Kept selection minimal to clear overhead components; did not include 'Exploration' because it is not clearly SG&A and may behave more like project/exploration expense than core administrative overhead. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Corporate social responsibility, [Income Statement] Investor relations, [Income Statement] Professional Fees, [Income Statement] Regulatory and transfer agent, [Income Statement] Salaries and benefits, [Income Statement] Stock-based compensation, [Income Statement] Travel
